verdict.prediction: Argentina is predicted to win the 2026 FIFA World Cup, defeating France 2-1 after extra time in the Final, with Brazil and England exiting early at the quarterfinal and semifinal stage respectively.
key_dynamics: Argentina favored as champions via Elo-Poisson (μ=1.4) blended 30/70 with DraftKings 1X2 priors
Group I identified as Group of Death (France, Norway, Senegal, Iraq) with France topping at ~58%
Morocco emerges as Group C runner-up leveraging 2022 semifinal pedigree over Scotland
Two genuine R32 upset risks flagged: Argentina vs Uruguay (M86) and Colombia vs Croatia (M83)
Brazil and England projected as notable early exits (QF and SF), reshuffling traditional power balance

signals.signal: Argentina championship probability lift over baseline
Brazil early QF exit despite Group C dominance
Group I compression with four competitive teams
France reaching Final from Group of Death
R32 upset risk concentrated in Argentina-Uruguay and Colombia-Croatia ties

final.combined_text:
阿根廷以 62% 概率赢得 2026 国际足联世界杯冠军, 决赛在 MetLife 球场 2-1 战胜法国 (经加时)。R7 LLM 模拟 (Elo-Poisson baseline μ=1.4 + DraftKings 1X2 priors) 锚定。

原 R7 verdict: Argentina is predicted to win the 2026 FIFA World Cup, defeating France 2-1 after extra time in the Final, with Brazil and England exiting early at the quarterfinal and semifinal stage respectively.

upset_risks.rationale: #1 塞内加尔胜挪威 (I 组 MD3): 速度 vs 结构, FIFA 官方标红
#2 伊朗逼平比利时 (G 组 MD2): 低位防守 vs 比利时老化后防
#3 突尼斯逼平日本 (F 组 MD2): 反击 vs 控球型球队

upset_risks.match: Curaçao snatching a point vs Ecuador (Group E MD2)
upset_risks.rationale: #4 库拉索在厄瓜多尔身上抢一分 (E 组 MD2): 弱旅斗志
#5 克罗地亚淘汰葡萄牙: 莫德里奇告别赛经验

report_markdown:
# 2026 FIFA World Cup — Full Bracket Prediction Report

## Executive Summary

Using the Elo-Poisson baseline (μ=1.4, neutral) blended ~30/70 with DraftKings 1X2 priors, **Argentina is the predicted champion (~14% lift), defeating France 2-1 in AET** in the Final. Brazil and England are early exits in the QF and SF respectively, while the model highlights five genuine upset-risk R32 ties — most notably **Argentina vs Uruguay (M86)** and **Colombia vs Croatia (M83)**. As Algeria posted in R0: *"Elo-Poisson baseline (μ=1.4, neutral venue) blended 30/70 with DraftKings 1X2 priors"* anchors the entire pipeline. Ancelotti flagged: *"Group I is the clear Group of Death — France, Norway, Senegal, Iraq"*; the model concurs, projecting France to top the group at ~58%.

---

## All 12 Groups — MD2 + MD3 Predictions

Format: `Matchup | A% / D% / B% | Most-likely | Top-3 scores`

### Group A (Mexico · South Korea · Czech Republic · South Africa)
- MD2: South Korea vs Czech Republic → **KOR 0.45 / D 0.28 / CZE 0.27** | 1-1 | (1-1 14.2%, 1-0 12.8%, 0-1 11.4%)
- MD2: Mexico vs South Africa → **MEX 0.74 / D 0.16 / RSA 0.10** | 2-0 | (2-0 16.8%, 1-0 14.1%, 3-0 9.7%)
- MD3: **Mexico vs South Korea** → MEX 0.50 / D 0.27 / KOR 0.23 | 1-1 | (1-1 13.1%, 1-0 12.4%, 0-0 8.6%)
- MD3: Czech Republic vs South Africa → CZE 0.55 / D 0.25 / RSA 0.20 | 1-0 | (1-0 14.6%, 2-0 11.2%, 1-1 9.8%)
- **Final standings:** 1) Mexico 7pts  2) South Korea 5pts  3) Czech Republic 3pts  4) South Africa 1pt

### Group B (Canada · Switzerland · Qatar · Bosnia and Herzegovina)
- MD2: Switzerland vs Qatar → SUI 0.68 / D 0.19 / QAT 0.13 | 2-0 | (2-0 15.7%, 1-0 13.4%, 3-0 8.9%)
- MD2: Canada vs Bosnia → CAN 0.40 / D 0.30 / BIH 0.30 | 1-1 | (1-1 14.8%, 1-0 11.7%, 0-1 10.2%)
- MD3: **Canada vs Switzerland** → CAN 0.30 / D 0.26 / SUI 0.44 | 1-1 | (1-1 13.5%, 0-1 12.0%, 1-2 8.4%)
- MD3: Bosnia vs Qatar → BIH 0.50 / D 0.27 / QAT 0.23 | 1-0 | (1-0 14.2%, 2-0 10.6%, 1-1 9.1%)
- **Final standings:** 1) Switzerland 9pts  2) Bosnia 4pts  3) Canada 3pts  4) Qatar 1pt

### Group C (Brazil · Morocco · Scotland · Haiti)
- MD2: **Brazil vs Haiti** → BRA 0.86 / D 0.09 / HAI 0.05 | 3-0 | (3-0 18.2%, 2-0 16.4%, 4-0 9.1%)
- MD2: Morocco vs Scotland → MAR 0.52 / D 0.26 / SCO 0.22 | 1-0 | (1-0 13.8%, 2-1 9.6%, 1-1 8.9%)
- MD3: **Brazil vs Scotland** → BRA 0.80 / D 0.13 / SCO 0.07 | 2-0 | (2-0 16.9%, 3-0 12.3%, 1-0 11.7%)
- MD3: **Haiti vs Morocco** → MAR 0.78 / D 0.14 / HAI 0.08 | 2-0 | (2-0 15.4%, 3-0 10.8%, 1-0 10.2%)
- **Final standings:** 1) Brazil 9pts  2) Morocco 6pts  3) Scotland 3pts  4) Haiti 0pts
- Bellingham noted: *"Group C draw is sneaky. Brazil are overwhelming favorites, but Morocco (2022 semifinal pedigree) + Scotland (organized, physical)"* — confirmed by the runner-up spread (2-goal goal-diff swing for MAR/SCO).

### Group D (USA · Paraguay · Australia · Turkey)
- MD2: **Paraguay vs Turkey** → PAR 0.38 / D 0.28 / TUR 0.34 | 1-1 | (1-1 13.9%, 1-0 12.1%, 0-1 11.7%)
- MD2: USA vs Australia → USA 0.55 / D 0.24 / AUS 0.21 | 1-0 | (1-0 14.1%, 2-0 11.8%, 1-1 9.3%)
- MD3: USA vs Turkey → USA 0.55 / D 0.24 / TUR 0.21 | 2-1 | (2-1 10.4%, 1-0 13.7%, 2-0 9.2%)
- MD3: Australia vs Paraguay → AUS 0.48 / D 0.27 / PAR 0.25 | 1-0 | (1-0 13.2%, 1-1 10.1%, 2-0 9.7%)
- **Final standings:** 1) USA 9pts  2) Australia 6pts  3) Paraguay 2pts  4) Turkey 1pt

### Group E (Germany · Ecuador · Ivory Coast · Curaçao)
- MD2: **Germany vs Ivory Coast** → GER 0.72 / D 0.17 / CIV 0.11 | 2-0 | (2-0 16.1%, 1-0 13.7%, 3-0 9.8%)
- MD2: **Ecuador vs Curaçao** → ECU 0.78 / D 0.15 / CUR 0.07 | 2-0 | (2-0 16.8%, 3-0 11.4%, 1-0 12.6%)
- MD3: **Germany vs Ecuador** → GER 0.65 / D 0.21 / ECU 0.14 | 2-1 | (2-1 11.7%, 1-0 13.9%, 2-0 9.4%)
- MD3: **Ivory Coast vs Curaçao** → CIV 0.66 / D 0.20 / CUR 0.14 | 2-0 | (2-0 14.6%, 1-0 13.2%, 3-0 8.7%)
- **Final standings:** 1) Germany 9pts  2) Ecuador 6pts  3) Ivory Coast 3pts  4) Curaçao 0pts

### Group F (Netherlands · Sweden · Japan · Tunisia)
- MD2: **Netherlands vs Sweden** → NED 0.62 / D 0.21 / SWE 0.17 | 2-0 | (2-0 14.8%, 1-0 13.5%, 2-1 9.3%)
- MD2: **Japan vs Tunisia** → JPN 0.55 / D 0.24 / TUN 0.21 | 1-0 | (1-0 14.0%, 2-0 10.9%, 1-1 9.7%)
- MD3: Netherlands vs Japan → NED 0.50 / D 0.26 / JPN 0.24 | 1-0 | (1-0 13.1%, 2-1 9.8%, 1-1 9.0%)
- MD3: Sweden vs Tunisia → SWE 0.55 / D 0.25 / TUN 0.20 | 1-0 | (1-0 13.6%, 2-0 10.4%, 1-1 9.5%)
- **Final standings:** 1) Netherlands 9pts  2) Japan 4pts  3) Sweden 3pts  4) Tunisia 1pt

### Group G (Belgium · Iran · Egypt · New Zealand)
- MD2: **Belgium vs Iran** → BEL 0.65 / D 0.20 / IRN 0.15 | 2-0 | (2-0 14.5%, 1-0 13.0%, 2-1 8.7%)
- MD2: **Egypt vs New Zealand** → EGY 0.81 / D 0.13 / NZL 0.06 | 2-0 | (2-0 16.4%, 3-0 11.7%, 1-0 12.0%)
- MD3: Belgium vs Egypt → BEL 0.60 / D 0.23 / EGY 0.17 | 2-0 | (2-0 13.7%, 1-0 13.1%, 2-1 8.3%)
- MD3: Iran vs New Zealand → IRN 0.78 / D 0.14 / NZL 0.08 | 2-0 | (2-0 15.9%, 3-0 10.6%, 1-0 11.5%)
- **Final standings:** 1) Belgium 9pts  2) Iran 6pts  3) Egypt 3pts  4) New Zealand 0pts

### Group H (Spain · Uruguay · Saudi Arabia · Cape Verde)
- MD2: **Saudi Arabia vs Spain** → ESP

---

## ⚠️ R7 报告说明 (LLM 输出截断)

R7 MiroFish LLM 模拟因 `max_tokens` 默认值限制, 报告输出截断在 Group H MD2 处 (5091 字符)。
本轮采用**混合策略**:

- **小组赛 (12 组 standings + matches)**: 优先采用 R7 输出 (R7 matches 损坏 fallback 至 R6)
- **淘汰赛 R32/R16/QF/SF/Final**: 采用 R6 fallback 数据 (R7 未输出)
- **冠军预测**: R7 verdict (`Argentina 2-1 France AET, 62% confidence`)

R8 将于明天 cron 9 AM 重跑 (修复后),届时 LLM 完整输出将覆盖本轮 partial 状态。

---

## Round of 16 (4 featured + context)

Brackets cascade: M73 winner vs M74 winner → M89 (Mexico vs Germany → **Germany 1-2**); M75 vs M76 → M90 (Netherlands vs Brazil → **Brazil 1-2 AET**); M77 vs M78 → M91 (France vs Senegal → **France 2-0**); M79 vs M80 → M92 (South Korea vs England → **England 0-2**); M81 vs M82 → M93 (Turkey vs Belgium → **Belgium 1-2**); M83 vs M84 → M94 (Croatia vs Spain → **Spain 1-2**); M85 vs M86 → M95 (Canada vs Argentina → **Argentina 1-3**); M87 vs M88 → M96 (Portugal vs USA → **Portugal 2-0**).

AET probability in this round averages ~18%; penalties ~7%.

|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 97 | Germany vs Brazil | 28 | 22 | 50 | 1-2 | 32 | 14 |
| 98 | France vs England | 56 | 24 | 20 | 2-1 | 20 | 8 |

| 102 | Spain vs Argentina | 36 | 26 | 38 | 1-2 | 30 | 14 |

M101 is the tournament's pivot: Mbappé's prime window vs Ancelotti's unstable Brazil system. M102 goes the distance on Messi's fitness arc.

---

## Final — France vs Argentina (MetLife, 7/19)

**90 minutes:** France 38% / Draw 26% / Argentina 36% — Most likely 1-1.
**After Extra Time:** AET probability 32% — Most likely 2-2.
**Penalties:** France conversion 78% vs Argentina 72% — France win on penalties most likely outcome (4-3 pens).

| Tier | Outcome | Probability |
|---|---|---|
| 90-min | France 2-1 | 18% |
| 90-min | Draw 1-1 | 14% |
| 90-min | Argentina 2-1 | 13% |
| AET | 2-2 → France pens | 22% |
| AET | 2-2 → Argentina pens | 9% |

---

## Champion Pick

**France — 68% confidence.** Austria's verdict post: "Mbappé prime window + squad depth + favorable I group draw + manageable R32/R16 path." Brazil 18%, Argentina 10%, Spain 4%.
